message:
feat: Add Python line number mapping in error tracebacks

- Add keyword occurrence tracking for raise/assert statements
- Record Python→Zig line mappings when generating raise/assert code
- Fix JSON parsing to skip whitespace after colon in mappings
- Now shows correct Python line numbers in error tracebacks:

  Traceback (most recent call last):
    File "/path/to/file.py", line 3
  ValueError: x must be positive

This completes Phase 1 of the debugger: source maps with Python line
number translation at runtime.
